zh.Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, England: 英國爾布利其-特拉福德
zh.Rixton-with-Glazebrook, Warrington, Lanc: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan de Rixton於1382年出生時，她的父親William de Rixton45歲，母親Lady Isabel de Warrington41歲。她於1410年與William Troutbeck在英國爾布利其-特拉福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年在英國爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan de Rixton于1382年出生时，她的父亲William de Rixton45岁，母亲Lady Isabel de Warrington41岁。她于1410年与William Troutbeck在英国爾布利其-特拉福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年在英国爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rixton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Angus and Aberdeenshire): habitational name from Roxton Farm in Immingham (Lincolnshire), from the Old English personal name Hrōc (genitive Hrōces) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan de Rixton was born in 1382, her father, William de Rixton, was 45 and her mother, Lady Isabel de Warrington, was 41. She married William Troutbeck in 1410, in Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1453, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan de Rixton est née en 1382, son père, William de Rixton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel de Warrington, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé William Troutbeck en 1410, à Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1453, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan de Rixton 1382 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Rixton 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel de Warrington 41. Sie hat 1410 in Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, England William Troutbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1453 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan de Rixton è nata il nel 1382, sua padre, William de Rixton, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel de Warrington, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato William Troutbeck nel 1410, nel Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1453, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Rixtonが1382年に生まれた時，父William de Rixtonは45歳，母Lady Isabel de Warringtonは41歳であった。1410年にイギリスチェシュアイアブリジェ-トラフォードでWilliam Troutbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年にイギリスチェシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Rixton(이)가 1382년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Rixton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel de Warrington(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 체실르 브리지-트래퍼드에서 William Troutbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 체실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Rixton-with-Glazebrook, Warrington, Lanc: Warrington, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan de Rixton nasceu em 1382, seu pai, William de Rixton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel de Warrington, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com William Troutbeck em 1410, em Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1453, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan de Rixton родилась в 1382 г., её отцу по имени William de Rixton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel de Warrington, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Troutbeck в 1410 г. в местности бридже-траффорд, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1453 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan de Rixton nació en 1382, su papá, William de Rixton, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel de Warrington, tenía 41 años. Se casó con William Troutbeck en 1410, en Bridge-Trafford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1453, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
